# webdesign

> End-to-end web design, art-direction, and frontend-build system for AI agents. Installs as an agent skill.

webdesign turns "design this page" into a controlled process instead of an improvised one. It takes
a page from creative direction → structure → per-section craft → build → art review → scored
critique, distilled from a production website-rebuild pipeline. The SKILL.md is a router — load
only the reference(s) the current job needs (never all 22 at once) — covering direction-setting,
per-section craft (layout, type, color, depth, imagery, motion, experimental WebGL), per-vertical
strategy, trust/proof/conversion, the frontend build (Next.js + Tailwind as the worked example — patterns port to any stack), and the art-review + scored-critique gates.
Claude Code is the reference host; it's plain Agent Skills format (agentskills.io), so it installs
on Codex, Cursor, Antigravity, opencode, Grok Build, and Hermes too.

## Install

- npm/skills.sh: `npx skills add gabros20/webdesign`
- Clone + installer (per-host targets: claude | codex | cursor | antigravity | opencode | grok | hermes | agents | all): `git clone https://github.com/gabros20/webdesign && cd webdesign && ./install.sh claude`
- Manual copy: `cp -R skills/webdesign ~/.claude/skills/webdesign`

## Docs

- [README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gabros20/webdesign/main/README.md): overview, install, the six-stage arc, repo map.
- [skills/webdesign/SKILL.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gabros20/webdesign/main/skills/webdesign/SKILL.md): the router — workflow arc, pick-by-job table, the non-negotiable laws.
- [docs/installation.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gabros20/webdesign/main/docs/installation.md): step-by-step install for Claude Code and other hosts.
- [docs/usage.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gabros20/webdesign/main/docs/usage.md): how the six stages fit together and when to enter at each one.
- [docs/stages.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gabros20/webdesign/main/docs/stages.md): direction, structure, craft, build, art review, and critique in depth.
- [docs/recipes.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gabros20/webdesign/main/docs/recipes.md): copy-paste starting points for common design/build jobs.

## Reference inventory (`skills/webdesign/references/`)

- `frontend-design-principles.md` — decide a visual direction / take a point of view / avoid generic.
- `design-direction.md` — record the direction as a DESIGN.md (format, tokens, lint).
- `section-archetypes.md` — plan a site's pages, nav, footer, section catalog + archetypes.
- `section-design-workflow.md` — the per-section craft router; points to the device references below.
- `layout-and-composition.md` — lay out a section / break the grid.
- `typography.md` — make type the hero.
- `color-and-rhythm.md` — set palette + section rhythm (light↔dark cadence, one accent).
- `depth-and-texture.md` — make it feel 3D / premium / not flat.
- `decoration.md` — add decoration (patterns, dividers, cutouts) without noise.
- `imagery.md` — present images as more than rectangles.
- `motion-and-interaction.md` — add motion / scroll interaction.
- `experimental-and-creative.md` — go Awwwards-tier (WebGL, shaders, particles, custom cursor).
- `niche-and-vertical-design.md` — design for a specific business/vertical + set the premium↔info dial.
- `trust-proof-and-structure.md` — build credibility / E-E-A-T / SEO structure / case studies.
- `persuasion-and-conversion.md` — drive & convert the user ethically (Cialdini, CCD, copy↔design).
- `design-thinking.md` — decide what to do & judge it (composition process, AI-slop tells).
- `frontend-build-patterns.md` — build the frontend from a design (reference stack Next.js + Tailwind; the patterns port to any stack).
- `tailwind-v4-theme.md` — map DESIGN.md tokens → a Tailwind v4 theme.
- `art-review.md` — review a finished build against its direction (punch-list).
- `design-critique.md` — run a scored review / go-no-go QA gate.
- `anti-default-catalog.md` — check a draft against the current named AI tells.
- `SOURCES.md` — trace a technique to its source.

## Optional

- [Visual guide](https://webdesign-skill.vercel.app): the six-stage arc, the laws, and the full reference map on one page.
